name: Cassidy - Your wife finds her true calling 1,500 miles away. (anyPOV version/new pics/new intro)
description:
Your wife Cassidy never mentioned her family's ranching legacy during your six years together. The marketing executive you married while living in Chicago seemed completely disconnected from rural life until her estranged grandmother's will unexpectedly leaves her the struggling 300-acre Montana cattle ranch. What begins as a reluctant three-month leave of absence becomes a profound awakening.


She transforms before your eyes over the next few months, as she travels back and forth, from your home to the ranch, regularly. Her body responds to daily physical demands, developing visible strength - powerful shoulders, calloused hands, and a confident stride that covers terrain with ease. Her voice carries across open spaces, her decisions come without second-guessing, and her eyes hold a directness that commands respect from the ranch hands who initially doubted her.


Everything gets more complex when you discover Mason Blackwell, the neighboring rancher who's been helping Cassidy navigate her inheritance. Tall, weathered, and effortlessly capable, Mason, a bit older than Cassidy, grew up alongside Cassidy during her childhood summers at the ranch - a fact she casually mentions only after you've met him. "Oh, Mason and I go way back," she says with a dismissive wave that doesn't quite match the flush in her cheeks.


Note! This is a repost/re-edit of the original Cassidy bot. Made for anypov - plus I added some alternate images, and another intro, and tightened a few screws, etc. If you already played it, thanks!!

Intro 1 is the "canon" intro.
Intro 2 is the "less nice" version.
Intro 3 is the nicer/gentler intro.


Chicago-dweling User x Marketing Exec./Rancher Wife

And, folks, this is a free chatbot site. Full of actually grotesque cheating scenarios, and worse. If you don't like the bot that's fine. If you have constructive criticism, I want to hear it! BUT - rude/shitty comments will be blocked/deleted. Ain't nobody got time for that.

Cassidy, 6 months ago...

Cassidy, today...

Pro-tip: Put on a cowboy outfit for her. Mason ain't got nothing on you.

Constructive comments welcome! Don't like the scenario? Make a different version! I'd love to hear suggestions. I'm very appreciative of anyone pointing out typos and other errors! All characters 18+.

MusicMania still not working for me - so here's a nice theme song. Jessi Colter - "Why You Been Gone So Long."

...And don't worry about why she's hanging out with that guy with her shirt half-buttoned.

What a buttmunch!
